title: GUIDE FOR FOOD MAKING VIDEOS
source_file: D:\reelops\niches\Food Making Videos\GUIDE FOR FOOD MAKING VIDEOS.docx
preserved_instructions_excerpt:
GROW WITH RASINDU
FOOD MAKING VIDEOS
–  GUIDE
JOIN OUR TELEGRAM CHANNEL👉 GrowWithRasindu
JOIN OUR WHATSAPP CHANNEL👉 GrowWithRasindu
Join my community to get future prompts and complete step-by-step guides
👉 nas.io/growwithrasindu
This guide is written in simple English.If you prefer to read this in your own language,copy this entire guide and paste it into ChatGPT.Then type: "Translate this into [your language]"and it will give you the full guide in your language.
මෙම මාර්ගෝපදේශය සරල ඉංග්‍රීසියෙන් ලියා ඇත.ඔබට ඔබේ භාෂාවෙන් කියවීමට අවශ්‍ය නම්,
මෙම සම්පූර්ණ මාර්ගෝපදේශය copy කර ChatGPT වෙත paste කරන්න.එවිට මෙසේ type කරන්න: "Translate this into Sinhala"එවිට ඔබට සිංහල භාෂාවෙන් සම්පූර්ණ මාර්ගෝපදේශය ලැබෙනු ඇත.
यह गाइड सरल अंग्रेजी में लिखी गई है।अगर आप इसे अपनी भाषा में पढ़ना चाहते हैं,तो इस पूरी गाइड को copy करके ChatGPT में paste करें।फिर टाइप करें: "Translate this into Hindi"और आपको पूरी गाइड हिंदी में मिल जाएगी।
هذا الدليل مكتوب باللغة الإنجليزية البسيطة.
إذا كنت تفضل قراءته بلغتك الخاصة،
انسخ هذا الدليل كاملاً والصقه في ChatGPT.
ثم اكتب: "Translate this into Arabic"
وستحصل على الدليل كاملاً باللغة العربية.
Step 01 — Paste the Master Prompt into Claude
Copy the Master Prompt and paste it into a new Claude chat. Claude will ask you to type a country name.
Step 02 — Type a Country Name
Type any country name you want. Examples: Italy, Japan, Mexico, Sri Lanka, Thailand, India, France, Korea. Claude will generate a list of 10 popular dishes from that country.
Step 03 — Select a Dish
Copy the name of the dish you want from the list and send it back to Claude. Claude will generate the full prompt package for that dish containing:
3 Image Prompts (under Preparation Prompts)
Multiple Video Prompts (under Preparation Prompts and Cooking Prompts)
Step 04 — Generate 3 Images in Google Flow
Image 01 — Empty Board:
Copy the Image 01 prompt
Go to Google Flow
Paste the prompt and generate
Download the best result
Image 02 — All Ingredients:
Upload Image 01 as the reference image
Paste the Image 02 prompt
Generate and download the best result
Image 03 — Half Ingredients:
Upload Image 02 as the reference image
Paste the Image 03 prompt
Generate and download the best result
Step 05 — Generate 2 Ingredient Placement Videos
VID 01 — First Half Ingredients Placed:
Upload Image 01 as the Start Frame
Upload Image 03 as the End Frame
Paste the VID 01 prompt
Generate and download
VID 02 — Remaining Ingredients Placed:
Upload Image 03 as the Start Frame
Upload Image 02 as the End Frame
Paste the VID 02 prompt
Generate and download
Step 06 — Generate Preparation Videos
Starting from VID 03, generate each preparation video one by one. For every preparation video:
Upload Image 01 (empty board) as both the Start Frame and End Frame
Paste the corresponding video prompt
Generate and download
Repeat this for every preparation video prompt until all are done.
Step 07 — Generate Cooking Videos
First Cooking Video (BASE):
Do not upload any Start Frame or End Frame
Select the video generation option in Google Flow
Paste the BASE cooking video prompt
Generate the video
All Remaining Cooking Videos:
Once the BASE video is generated, select the Extend option on that video
Paste the next cooking video prompt
Generate
Once that video is generated, select the Extend option on it again
Paste the next cooking video prompt
Continue extending forward with each cooking prompt until the last one including the final hero shot
Download all cooking videos.
Step 08 — Edit in CapCut
Open CapCut
Add all downloaded videos to the timeline in this order:
VID 01 — First half ingredients placed
VID 02 — Remaining ingredients placed
VID 03, 04, 05... — All preparation videos in order
All cooking videos in order (BASE + all extends)
Add text overlays if needed
Preview and fix any issues
Export the final video
Quick Reference
Grow with Rasindu
